transforms: Added sy-homs-military-academy as the last accepted held military candidate.
Resolved foundedYear to 1933 from the dedicated Wikipedia/Wikidata item while retaining a note about the list-source 1919 conflict.
Kept website null because no official website was confirmed from approved sources.
v0.1.11 restored the production boundary to records present in the internal comparison control list and moved non-control-list additions back to the held-candidate backlog.
reviewNotes: Reviewed Homs Military Academy candidate resolution. Superseded by v0.1.11 because the candidate is not present in the internal comparison control list; retained in the held-candidate backlog.
